channel.title: easy-snack-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh easy-snack-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Fresh and Flavorful Summer Veggie Finger Foods for Easy Entertaining
item.description: These vibrant veggie finger foods are my go-to for summer hangouts. Crisp, colorful veggies paired with zesty dips make snacking effortless and tasty — perfect for casual gatherings or last-minute guests!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup baby carrots, washed and trimmed
  • 1 cup cucumber slices, about 1/4 inch thick
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup colorful bell pepper strips (red, yellow, orange)
  • 1/2 cup sugar snap peas, trimmed
  • 1/2 cup hummus, for dipping
  • 1/2 cup tzatziki sauce, for dipping
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon olive oil
  • Salt and pepper, to taste
  • Fresh herbs (parsley or dill) for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230221583 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #carrots #cucumber #cherry

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh and Flavorful Summer Veggie Finger Foods for Easy Entertaining
media:content.media:description: These vibrant veggie finger foods are my go-to for summer hangouts. Crisp, colorful veggies paired with zesty dips make snacking effortless and tasty — perfect for casual gatherings or last-minute guests!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230221583, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, carrots, cucumber, cherry

item.title: Fresh Herb-Packed Finger Foods Perfect for Last-Minute Gatherings
item.description: These finger foods burst with fresh herbs, making every bite vibrant and refreshing. They’re super easy to make, great for casual get-togethers or when you need a quick party snack that feels homemade.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup fresh parsley, finely chopped
  • 1/2 cup fresh basil, finely chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh chives, finely chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh dill, finely chopped
  • 1 cup cream cheese, softened
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 baguette, sliced into 1/2 inch pieces

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230221583 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Herb-Packed Finger Foods Perfect for Last-Minute Gatherings
media:content.media:description: These finger foods burst with fresh herbs, making every bite vibrant and refreshing. They’re super easy to make, great for casual get-togethers or when you need a quick party snack that feels homemade.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230221583, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh

item.title: Fresh and Easy Caprese Skewers with Balsamic Glaze for Summer Parties
item.description: These Caprese skewers are a fresh, bite-sized take on the classic Italian salad. Juicy cherry tomatoes, creamy mozzarella, and fragrant basil come together with a sweet balsamic drizzle. Perfect for summer gatherings or quick snacks!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pint cherry tomatoes, washed and dried
  • 8 ounces fresh mozzarella balls (bocconcini), drained
  • Fresh basil leaves, about 24 leaves
  • 1/4 cup balsamic glaze
  • 24 small wooden skewers or toothpicks
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230221583 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cherry #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh and Easy Caprese Skewers with Balsamic Glaze for Summer Parties
media:content.media:description: These Caprese skewers are a fresh, bite-sized take on the classic Italian salad. Juicy cherry tomatoes, creamy mozzarella, and fragrant basil come together with a sweet balsamic drizzle. Perfect for summer gatherings or quick snacks!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230221583, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cherry, fresh

item.title: Juicy Mini Chicken Meatball Sliders with Tangy Sauce for Parties
item.description: These mini chicken meatball sliders are juicy, packed with flavor, and topped with melty cheese and a tangy sauce. They’re perfect finger food for casual gatherings or game nights. Trust me, they’re a total crowd-pleaser!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound ground chicken, fresh
  • 1/2 cup breadcrumbs, plain
  • 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 large egg, beaten
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
  • 8 mini slider buns, soft
  • 4 slices provolone cheese, halved
  • 1/2 cup marinara sauce
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230221583 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pound #breadcrumbs #grated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Juicy Mini Chicken Meatball Sliders with Tangy Sauce for Parties
media:content.media:description: These mini chicken meatball sliders are juicy, packed with flavor, and topped with melty cheese and a tangy sauce. They’re perfect finger food for casual gatherings or game nights. Trust me, they’re a total crowd-pleaser!
